messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

To create a new branch in your local repository, you can use the following git command:

```bash
git checkout -b new-branch-name
```

This will create a new branch named `new-branch-name` and switch to it. 

If you want to create the branch but stay on your current branch, you can use:

```bash
git branch new-branch-name
```

You can later switch to this branch using `git checkout new-branch-name`.
